title: Create: Deco Generators
description: A illegal way to get create mod blocks [ Asurine, Crimsite, Ochrum, Veridium ] same as vanilla cobblestone generator
body:
Ever felt stuck in Skyblock or low-resource Create worlds where finding the four palette stones (Asurine, Crimsite, Ochrum, and Veridium) is a grind? This mod introduces a cheeky, **“illegal”** solution—turning molten metals and stone mixtures into a generator system for these rare blocks! Think of it like a cobblestone generator, but supercharged with Create mechanics. Toss your chosen metal into a blazing hot setup, mix it with molten stone, and—boom—you’ve got your missing palette block. But here’s the twist: it’s not as simple as it sounds. To reach the molten stage, you’ll need a superheated Blaze Burner. Don’t worry if Blaze Cakes feel too pricey—this mod adds Blazing Fuel, a quick snack for your burner that gives you 15 seconds of superheated power to get the job done. This design keeps the challenge alive while opening up creative freedom in worlds where ore generation is limited or absent. No more dead-end builds—your palette dreams are back on the table. ⚠️ Heads-up: some textures are borrowed since I’m not exactly a pixel art wizard.
⚠️ Note: This mod is a one-off project for NeoForge and may not see regular updates.
